why_it_matters: Introduces the purpose and system of the GRI Standards and sets foundation requirements for sustainability reporting
key_outputs: Foundation standard for using GRI Standards
notes: Curated Phase 4 sustainability reporting priority record

why_it_matters: Defines general disclosures about governance strategy ethics practices and stakeholder engagement
notes: Curated Phase 4 sustainability reporting priority record

why_it_matters: Defines the process for identifying reporting and managing material sustainability topics
notes: Curated Phase 4 sustainability reporting priority record

sector_applicability: Organizations with biodiversity impacts and dependencies
why_it_matters: Provides topic disclosures for biodiversity impacts dependencies and management approaches
notes: GRI notes the revised biodiversity standard came into effect for reporting in 2026

why_it_matters: Provides topic disclosures for climate change impacts transition plans mitigation and adaptation
notes: GRI notes revised Climate Change and Energy standards published in 2025 and effective from 2027

name_full: SASB Oil & Gas - Exploration & Production Standard
sector_applicability: Oil and gas exploration and production companies
why_it_matters: Identifies industry-based disclosure topics and metrics for sustainability-related risks and opportunities in oil and gas exploration and production
notes: IFRS Foundation assumed responsibility for SASB Standards in 2022

why_it_matters: Identifies sustainability disclosure topics and metrics for commercial banking including financed emissions data security and financial inclusion
notes: Representative high-impact financial sector SASB standard

why_it_matters: Identifies sustainability disclosure topics and metrics for software and IT services including data privacy security and workforce issues
Identifies sustainability disclosure topics and metrics for health care delivery including patient safety data security and access to care
Identifies sustainability disclosure topics and metrics for agricultural products including water management food safety and supply chain impacts
notes: Representative food and agriculture SASB standard
